# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of AuraBlock seriously. 

To report a security vulnerability, please use the **Private vulnerability reporting** feature on GitHub (Security -> Advisories -> Report a vulnerability).

If you are unable to use GitHub's private reporting, please contact the maintainer directly. All security issues will be promptly addressed.
